Alireza Beiranvand.bio: Iran's iconic goalkeeper whose remarkable rags-to-riches story saw him walk hundreds of kilometers to Tehran as a teenager to pursue his football dream. A national hero who famously saved a Cristiano Ronaldo penalty at the 2018 World Cup.
Alireza Beiranvand.playingStyle: Powerful, athletic goalkeeper with exceptional long throws that can launch counterattacks, combined with outstanding shot-stopping ability
Alireza Beiranvand.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed first-choice goalkeeper and defensive leader for Team Melli
Alireza Beiranvand.notableFact: Saved a Cristiano Ronaldo penalty at the 2018 World Cup in Russia, becoming a global sensation overnight

Sadegh Moharrami.bio: Right-back who has built an impressive career in Croatian football with Dinamo Zagreb, becoming one of the most attack-minded defenders in Iranian football history.
Sadegh Moharrami.playingStyle: Offensive-minded full-back with excellent crossing ability and the fitness to get up and down the right flank all game
Sadegh Moharrami.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back providing width and attacking quality on the right flank
Sadegh Moharrami.notableFact: Has been a key player for Dinamo Zagreb in the Croatian league and in their European competition campaigns

Ehsan Hajsafi.bio: Iran's most capped active player with an astonishing 130 caps, Hajsafi is a true legend of Iranian football. The veteran left-back and captain has played across Europe in Germany, Greece, and beyond.
Ehsan Hajsafi.playingStyle: Experienced, intelligent left-back who reads the game superbly and provides calm, assured defending with the ability to contribute going forward
Ehsan Hajsafi.worldCup2026Role: Captain, defensive leader, and starting left-back bringing unmatched international experience
Ehsan Hajsafi.notableFact: Has earned over 130 caps for Iran, making him one of the most capped players in Asian football history

Shoja Khalilzadeh.bio: Veteran center-back who has played across the Middle East including stints in Qatar and the UAE. A commanding defender who has been part of Iran's backline for many years.
Shoja Khalilzadeh.playingStyle: Physical, experienced center-back who dominates aerial duels and organizes the defensive line with authority
Shoja Khalilzadeh.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back providing leadership and aerial presence in defense
Shoja Khalilzadeh.notableFact: Has extensive experience in Middle Eastern football leagues including successful stints in Qatar and the UAE

Milad Mohammadi.bio: Attacking left-back who has played in Greece with AEK Athens after previous experience in Belgium and Russia. Known for his memorable acrobatic throw-in technique that went viral at the 2018 World Cup.
Milad Mohammadi.playingStyle: Dynamic, attack-minded left-back who loves to get forward and deliver crosses, known for his flair and creativity
Milad Mohammadi.worldCup2026Role: Attacking left-back option competing with Hajsafi, bringing offensive dynamism
Milad Mohammadi.notableFact: Went viral at the 2018 World Cup for his acrobatic somersault throw-in technique against Spain

Saeid Ezatolahi.bio: Defensive midfielder who has been a key player for Iran since his teenage years. Has gained experience across European leagues in Russia, Denmark, and beyond, serving as the midfield shield.
Saeid Ezatolahi.playingStyle: Strong, combative defensive midfielder who breaks up play effectively and provides a solid screen in front of the defense
Saeid Ezatolahi.worldCup2026Role: Key defensive midfielder tasked with protecting the back four and controlling the midfield battle
Saeid Ezatolahi.notableFact: Made his Iran debut as a teenager and has been a consistent presence in the squad for nearly a decade

Alireza Jahanbakhsh.bio: Former Eredivisie top scorer who won the golden boot with AZ Alkmaar before a move to Brighton in the Premier League. One of Iran's most decorated European-based players with 80 caps and 15 goals.
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.playingStyle: Creative, left-footed winger who cuts inside to shoot or create, with excellent set-piece delivery and an eye for spectacular goals
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.worldCup2026Role: Experienced winger and creative outlet, one of Iran's most important attacking players
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.notableFact: Won the Eredivisie golden boot as the league's top scorer with AZ Alkmaar in the 2017-18 season

Morteza Pouraliganji.bio: Experienced center-back who has been a pillar of Iran's defense for years with 70 caps. After stints in China and Qatar, he returned to Persepolis in the Persian Gulf Pro League.
Morteza Pouraliganji.playingStyle: Solid, no-nonsense center-back who excels in aerial duels and brings consistency and reliability to the defense
Morteza Pouraliganji.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back providing depth and reliability in the defensive rotation
Morteza Pouraliganji.notableFact: Represented Iran at both the 2018 and 2022 World Cups, bringing invaluable tournament experience

Mehdi Taremi.bio: Iran's premier striker who starred at Porto in the Portuguese league before moving on to top European competition. With 45 goals in 75 caps, he is Iran's most prolific active goalscorer and one of Asia's best forwards.
Mehdi Taremi.playingStyle: Complete striker who combines aerial ability with technical skill, capable of scoring all types of goals and also dropping deep to create
Mehdi Taremi.worldCup2026Role: Star striker and leading goal threat, the focal point of Iran's attack
Mehdi Taremi.notableFact: One of the top-scoring Asian players in European football history, having netted over 80 goals for Porto across all competitions

Karim Ansarifard.bio: Veteran striker with 30 goals in 95 caps, one of Iran's all-time leading scorers. Has played across Europe including Greece, England, and Cyprus, bringing vast experience to the forward line.
Karim Ansarifard.playingStyle: Classic poacher with excellent positioning in the box and clinical finishing ability with either foot
Karim Ansarifard.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup striker providing a proven goal-scoring option from the bench
Karim Ansarifard.notableFact: One of Iran's top five all-time international goalscorers with 30 goals across nearly a century of caps

Vahid Amiri.bio: Hardworking winger who has been a loyal servant for Persepolis in the Persian Gulf Pro League and a consistent performer for Iran with 80 caps. Known for his tireless running and team-first mentality.
Vahid Amiri.playingStyle: Industrious winger who combines relentless work rate with tactical discipline, always willing to track back and defend
Vahid Amiri.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad player providing width, work rate, and defensive coverage on the wing
Vahid Amiri.notableFact: Has been one of Persepolis' most consistent performers and holds over 80 caps for Iran

Hossein Hosseini.bio: Backup goalkeeper playing for Esteghlal, one of Iran's biggest clubs. A reliable presence who has served as understudy to Beiranvand in the national team setup.
Hossein Hosseini.playingStyle: Dependable goalkeeper with strong reflexes and good command of his penalty area
Hossein Hosseini.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing experienced backup behind Beiranvand
Hossein Hosseini.notableFact: Plays for Esteghlal, one of the two biggest clubs in Iranian football alongside Persepolis

Majid Hosseini.bio: Tall center-back who has gained valuable experience in Turkish football with Kayserispor after coming through the Iranian domestic league. A physically imposing defender with 45 caps.
Majid Hosseini.playingStyle: Tall, commanding center-back who uses his height and strength to dominate aerial challenges and defend set pieces
Majid Hosseini.worldCup2026Role: Key center-back option, especially valuable in set-piece defensive situations
Majid Hosseini.notableFact: Has been a regular starter in the Turkish Super Lig with Kayserispor, competing against top-level opposition weekly

Saman Ghoddos.bio: Swedish-born attacking midfielder of Iranian descent who chose to represent Iran at international level. A technically gifted player who has played in France, Spain, and the UAE.
Saman Ghoddos.playingStyle: Technically accomplished attacking midfielder with good vision and the ability to operate between the lines to create chances
Saman Ghoddos.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option providing flair and invention in the final third
Saman Ghoddos.notableFact: Born and raised in Sweden, he chose to represent Iran over Sweden at international level through his Iranian heritage

Rouzbeh Cheshmi.bio: Center-back who plays for Esteghlal in the Persian Gulf Pro League. Became a national hero after scoring a dramatic late goal against Wales at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.
Rouzbeh Cheshmi.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-back who carries a goal threat from set pieces and can deliver clutch moments in big matches
Rouzbeh Cheshmi.worldCup2026Role: Center-back option who adds a significant set-piece goal threat to the squad
Rouzbeh Cheshmi.notableFact: Scored a stunning long-range goal in stoppage time against Wales at the 2022 World Cup, one of the tournament's most memorable moments

Mehdi Torabi.bio: Creative midfielder for Persepolis who is known for his left foot and spectacular long-range goals. A technical player who has been a key figure in Iranian domestic football.
Mehdi Torabi.playingStyle: Left-footed playmaker with an exceptional long-range shot and the ability to deliver dangerous set pieces
Mehdi Torabi.worldCup2026Role: Midfield option providing set-piece expertise and long-range goal threat
Mehdi Torabi.notableFact: Has scored numerous spectacular goals for Persepolis, earning a reputation as one of the best long-range shooters in Iranian football

Ali Gholizadeh.bio: Left winger who has established himself in Belgian football with Charleroi. A skillful, tricky winger who has been a consistent performer for Iran with 40 caps and 6 goals.
Ali Gholizadeh.playingStyle: Quick, agile winger who uses his low center of gravity and close control to dribble past defenders and create chances
Ali Gholizadeh.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking option on the left wing, providing creativity and goal threat
Ali Gholizadeh.notableFact: Has been one of the standout performers in the Belgian First Division with Charleroi for several seasons

Ali Karimi.bio: Midfielder who has gained experience in Turkish football with Kayserispor. Not to be confused with the legendary Iranian midfielder of the same name, this Ali Karimi has built his own career with 30 caps.
Ali Karimi.playingStyle: Industrious central midfielder who combines defensive work with the ability to drive forward and contribute to attacks
Ali Karimi.worldCup2026Role: Midfield option providing energy and balance in the center of the park
Ali Karimi.notableFact: Shares his name with Iran's legendary former captain Ali Karimi, who is widely regarded as one of the greatest Iranian players ever

Sardar Azmoun.bio: Iran's second-highest active scorer with 50 goals in 75 caps, Azmoun is one of the most prolific strikers in Asian football history. Known as the 'Iranian Messi,' he starred at Zenit St Petersburg and Bayer Leverkusen before moving to the UAE.
Sardar Azmoun.playingStyle: Elegant, clinical striker with exceptional movement, aerial ability, and the technique to score a wide variety of goals
Sardar Azmoun.worldCup2026Role: Co-star striker alongside Taremi, forming one of Asia's most lethal forward partnerships
Sardar Azmoun.notableFact: Nicknamed the 'Iranian Messi' for his extraordinary goal-scoring record, with 50 international goals making him one of Iran's all-time top scorers

Ahmad Nourollahi.bio: Experienced midfielder with 55 caps who has been a consistent presence in the Iranian midfield for years. Currently playing in the UAE after a successful career with Persepolis.
Ahmad Nourollahi.playingStyle: Well-rounded central midfielder who covers ground effectively, distributes the ball accurately, and contributes defensively
Ahmad Nourollahi.worldCup2026Role: Important midfield option providing experience, tactical discipline, and reliable passing
Ahmad Nourollahi.notableFact: Was a key player for Persepolis during their AFC Champions League campaigns before moving to the UAE

Omid Noorafkan.bio: Young left-back playing for Esteghlal in the Persian Gulf Pro League. A modern full-back who brings dynamism and attacking intent to the left side of defense.
Omid Noorafkan.playingStyle: Energetic, attack-minded left-back with pace and the willingness to overlap and deliver crosses into the box
Omid Noorafkan.worldCup2026Role: Dynamic left-back option providing attacking cover and a youthful alternative
Omid Noorafkan.notableFact: Has been one of the top young full-backs in the Persian Gulf Pro League with Esteghlal

Amir Abedzadeh.bio: Goalkeeper who carries one of Iranian football's most famous names, as the son of legendary keeper Ahmad Reza Abedzadeh. Has played in Portugal and Spain, bringing European experience.
Amir Abedzadeh.playingStyle: Technically proficient goalkeeper with good footwork and distribution, comfortable playing out from the back
Amir Abedzadeh.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing depth and a different skill set in the goalkeeping group
Amir Abedzadeh.notableFact: Son of Iranian goalkeeping legend Ahmad Reza Abedzadeh, who starred at the 1998 World Cup

Ramin Rezaeian.bio: Veteran right-back with 50 caps who has played in Qatar, Belgium, and Iran. An experienced defender who has been part of multiple World Cup campaigns for Iran.
Ramin Rezaeian.playingStyle: Experienced, reliable right-back who provides defensive stability and measured attacking contributions
Ramin Rezaeian.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive option providing backup at right-back and leadership in the squad
Ramin Rezaeian.notableFact: Has represented Iran at multiple major tournaments including the 2018 and 2022 World Cups

Mohammad Mohebi.bio: Young right-back playing for Esteghlal who has been pushing for a regular place in the national team. Represents the newer generation of Iranian full-backs.
Mohammad Mohebi.playingStyle: Athletic, energetic right-back who combines defensive work with the pace to contribute in attack
Mohammad Mohebi.worldCup2026Role: Young right-back option providing fresh legs and future development potential
Mohammad Mohebi.notableFact: Has risen through the ranks at Esteghlal, one of Iran's biggest clubs, to earn national team recognition

Shahab Zahedi.bio: Striker who has been playing in Ukrainian football with Zorya Luhansk, continuing to perform despite the challenging circumstances in the country. A reliable goal-scoring option for Iran.
Shahab Zahedi.playingStyle: Clinical striker with good finishing ability and intelligent movement in the box
Shahab Zahedi.worldCup2026Role: Backup striker providing additional goal-scoring depth in the forward line
Shahab Zahedi.notableFact: Has continued to perform at a high level in Ukrainian football despite the extremely challenging circumstances in the country

Allahyar Sayyadmanesh.bio: One of the youngest players in the Iranian squad, the gifted forward has been developing in Belgian football with Westerlo after time at Fenerbahce in Turkey. Seen as the future of Iranian attacking football.
Allahyar Sayyadmanesh.playingStyle: Quick, dynamic young forward with excellent technical ability and the willingness to take on defenders
Allahyar Sayyadmanesh.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young attacking option who can make an impact as a substitute or in rotation
Allahyar Sayyadmanesh.notableFact: Signed by Turkish giants Fenerbahce as a teenager, highlighting his enormous potential as one of Iran's brightest young talents
